welcome.lede: Assign them work like you'd assign a colleague — they pick it up, update status, and comment when done.
welcome.lede_web: Desktop bundles the runtime — nothing to install. Continue on web to connect your own CLI.
welcome.lede_desktop: By the end, a real agent will be replying to your first issue.
welcome.illustration_caption: Every issue, every thread, every decision — shared by your team and agents.

illustration.card1_body_prefix: can you draft a short launch post? Pull from
illustration.card2_body: On it. Pulling Research's quotes, drafting around the "time saved" angle…
illustration.card3_body: This week's user interviews summarized — 12 calls, 4 recurring themes, 3 pull-quotes.
illustration.card4_body: Reviewed Monday's draft — left 4 notes on tone. Standing by for the new one.
illustration.card5_body_suffix: flagged. Preview link in the PR.

questionnaire.headline: Three questions to get to know you.
questionnaire.q1_other_placeholder: e.g. a small community I help run
questionnaire.q3_question: What do you want to do with Multica?
questionnaire.unlock_starter_body: A Getting Started checklist shaped by your answers.
questionnaire.unlock_agents_body: Connect a runtime and we'll pick a template for your role — plus write its first task.

runtime_aside.what_suffix: is a small background process that runs on your machine. It connects your workspace to AI coding tools like Claude Code or Codex, and executes the tasks your agents pick up.
runtime_aside.swap_body: Each agent's runtime is just a setting. Change it whenever you want.
runtime_aside.add_more_body: You can connect a second runtime on another machine for a team, or a dedicated one per agent.

cli_install.intro: You'll need an AI coding tool on this machine (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, …) for the daemon to do real work. Also works on servers and remote dev boxes.

starter_content.title: Welcome — add starter tasks?
starter_content.description_suffix: project with short tasks that walk through how agents, issues, and context work in Multica.
starter_content.success_toast: Starter tasks added — check your sidebar

cloud_waitlist.intro_main: Cloud runtimes aren't live yet. Leave your email and we'll reach out when they are.
cloud_waitlist.intro_warning: Heads-up: agents can't execute tasks without a runtime — if you hit Skip now, your workspace is read-only until you come back and install one.
cloud_waitlist.reason_placeholder: e.g. we want agents running 24/7, or my team works across different devices.
cloud_waitlist.success_toast: You're on the list. We'll email when cloud runtimes are live.
